name: OudsAlertMessage
desc: OUDS Alert Message design guidelines

name: OudsAlertMessage.new
desc: Creates an OudsAlertMessage.

name: actionLayout
desc: An optional clickable link to trigger an action.

name: bulletList
desc: An optional list of bullet points to display below the main content.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: description
desc: Optional supplementary text providing more detail.

name: label
desc: The main message displayed in the alert.

name: onClose
desc: A callback invoked when the close button is clicked. If null, the close button is not shown.

name: onDescriptionLinkTapped
desc: A callback invoked when a link in the description is tapped.

name: status
desc: The status of the alert, which determines its background color and icon.

name: OudsAlertMessageActionLayout
desc: Represents a clickable action within an OudsAlertMessage.

name: OudsAlertMessageActionLayout.new
desc: Creates a new action link for an OudsAlertMessage.

name: layout
desc:
The position of the link within the alert message.
Defaults to OudsAlertMessageActionLayoutEnum.none.

name: onClick
desc: The callback to be invoked when the action link is pressed.

name: text
desc: The text label for the action link.

name: OudsAlertMessageActionLayoutEnum
desc: Defines the position of an OudsAlertMessageActionLayout within the alert message.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: OudsBottomBar
desc: Reference design version: 1.0.0

name: OudsBottomBar.new
desc: Creates an adaptive OUDS bottom bar.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: destinations
desc: The list of OudsNavigationBarItem to display.

name: onDestinationSelected
desc: Callback triggered when a destination is tapped (returns the tapped index).

name: selectedIndex
desc: The currently selected destination index.

name: translucent
desc: If true, renders a translucent background; otherwise opaque.

name: OudsBottomNavigationBar
desc: Alias for OudsBottomBar.

name: OudsBottomSheetScaffold
desc:
A scaffold that displays a standard (persistent) bottom sheet anchored to
the bottom of the screen, co-existing with the main content.

name: content
desc: Builder for the main content of the screen.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: onExpansionChanged
desc:
Called when the sheet changes between expanded and partially expanded.
true = expanded, false = collapsed.

name: sheetContent
desc: Builder for the content of the bottom sheet.

name: sheetDragHandle
desc:
Toggles the visibility of the drag handle at the top of the bottom sheet.
When true, shows OudsBottomSheetDefaults.dragHandle.

name: sheetPeekHeight
desc: The height of the bottom sheet when it is collapsed.

name: sheetSwipeEnabled
desc: Whether the sheet swiping is enabled and should react to the user's input.

name: topBar
desc: The top app bar of the screen.

name: OudsBottomSheetScaffoldState
desc: State for OudsBottomSheetScaffold.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: didUpdateWidget
desc: Called whenever the widget configuration changes.

name: dispose
desc: Called when this object is removed from the tree permanently.

name: expand
desc: Expand the sheet to its maximum height.

name: initState
desc: Called when this object is inserted into the tree.

name: isExpanded
desc: Whether the sheet is currently expanded.

name: partialExpand
desc: Collapse the sheet to its peek height.

name: kOudsBottomSheetPeekHeight
desc: Default peek height for the standard bottom sheet (56 dp).

desc: A status that provides informational context without urgency.

name: Warning

name: OudsModalBottomSheet
desc:
A modal bottom sheet that temporarily blocks interaction with the main
screen, displaying secondary content anchored to the bottom.

desc: Builder for the sheet content.

name: dragHandle
desc: Whether to show the drag handle pill.

name: sheetGesturesEnabled
desc:
Whether drag gestures are enabled.
Maps to Flutter's showModalBottomSheet.enableDrag.

name: show
desc: Display this OudsModalBottomSheet as a modal dialog.
